info.name: Rentoo Backend API
info.description: Postman collection for the Rentoo backend. Import the Rentoo Local environment before running requests.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Wedding decor set",
  "description": "Decor, chairs and table accessories for a toy/wedding event.",
  "category": {{category_id}},
  "price_per_day": 150000,
  "deposit": 300000,
  "condition": "good",
  "address": "Tashkent, Chilanzar",
  "city": "Tashkent",
  "latitude": 41.2995,
  "longitude": 69.2401,
  "min_rental_days": 1
}
